demo.title: imagetools.sh
demo.code:
# Dry-run first — needs no key, prints the exact Replicate request
node imagetools.mjs --op upscale --image in/art.png --scale 4 --dry-run

# Upscale 4x — bring your own Replicate key
REPLICATE_API_TOKEN=r8_xxx node imagetools.mjs \
  --op upscale --image in/art.png --scale 4 --out out/art-4x.png

# Remove the background
REPLICATE_API_TOKEN=r8_xxx node imagetools.mjs \
  --op bg-remove --image in/subject.png --out out/cutout.png

setup: Node 18+ — uses built-in fetch, zero dependencies (no npm install)
Bring your own Replicate API token: export REPLICATE_API_TOKEN (get one at https://replicate.com/account/api-tokens). Ops are billed to your Replicate account, not MythosForge.
Verify with `--dry-run` (needs no key) before any live run
